name: @methodfi/openapi
description: OpenAPI specification for the Method API

scripts.bundle: redocly bundle openapi/openapi.yaml --config .redocly.yaml -o latest/openapi.bundled.yaml && redocly bundle openapi/openapi.yaml --config .redocly.yaml -o latest/openapi.bundled.json
scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm bundle && pnpm routes
